archetypes.name: Positional Offensive Pressure
archetypes.description: Create or exploit an advantageous position to apply direct pressure against a target while preserving your ability to continue the attack. The pattern centers on maneuvering into effective striking alignment before committing force.

instances.description: Use a damaging move in battle to lower the opposing Pokémon’s HP and eventually knock it out. Use this on your turn whenever a fight starts or continues and you want to win the battle in Pokémon Red.

instances.description: Moves the worker around an accessible side of a box to get behind it, opening a valid push route. Use it in Sokoban when a box is reachable but blocked from the needed pushing direction.

archetypes.name: Secure Base Expansion
archetypes.description: Build from a stable, low-risk foundation before extending outward. When you have protected space or a safe anchor, use it to reinforce position and enable stronger future growth.
